reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención en Boxes. Personal no capacitado para contacto con clientes. No puedo evaluar el servicio de boxes porque decidí no avanzar con gente tan mal preparada.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service at the pit box. The staff is not trained to interact with customers. I cannot rate the pit box service because I decided not to continue with such poorly trained staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHdEppZG5nRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNU1fS3BnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una YPF, eso hace que tenga un estándar alto de entrada. Ahora... Pedí una factura A y me dijeron que tenía que hacer un trámite en la administración y no se qué más. Por qué?!!! de qué estamos hablando??

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF station, which means it has a high standard of service. Now... I asked for an A-type invoice and they told me I had to complete some paperwork at the administration office and I don't know what else. Why?! What are we even talking about?!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNUs2T0xnEAE

reviews.comment:
Suelen haber muchos autos pero se esfuerzan en agilizar. Muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
There are usually a lot of cars, but they make an effort to speed things up. Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcE1yQnpBRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Horario muy acotado en sector repuestos y accesorios
Atención regular del jefe de playa

Very limited hours in the parts and accessories department.
Regular service from the service manager.

reviews.comment:
Llevé mi auto para hacer cambio de aceite, filtros y chequeo. Y en menos de veinte minutos hicieron todo, cuando me dijeron que tardarían entre 45 y 60 minutos.

(Translated by Google)
I took my car in for an oil change, filter check, and inspection. They did everything in less than 20 minutes, even though they told me it would take 45 to 60 minutes.
